title: Ponified
description: Ponified is a mod that brings adorable plush ponies into your Minecraft world! Each plush pony is tied to unique achievements inspired by beloved characters. Explore the world, and enjoy collecting them!
body:
# Discover the Magic of Ponified Minecraft!

Step into a world of charm and collectibles with Ponified! This mod transforms your Minecraft experience with adorable plush ponies, each tied to unique achievements inspired by beloved characters. Adventure awaits as you explore, collect, and display your growing collection of pony plushies!

Features:

 🎁 **Plushie Collectibles:**
 
 Unlock adorable plush ponies by completing unique achievements 
 inspired by your favorite characters. 
 Each plushie holds its own charm and story—can you find them all?
    
 🏆 **Achievement-Driven Gameplay:**
 
 Engage in tasks that reflect the character traits of iconic ponies. 
 Whether it's an act of kindness, creativity, or bravery, 
 each achievement leads to a new collectible!

 🌈 **Decorate Your World:**
 
 Showcase your collection of plush ponies as decorations in your builds 
 or create a dedicated display area to celebrate your achievements.
![Mares](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01671fcd4319464ea59de4fceb7f3588f00a5c89.png)
### What's New in Version **0.3**?


🏆 **More Achievements:**

New challenges have been added to test your creativity and exploration skills.

A Focused Experience:
Ponified now centers around plushie collectibles and achievement-based gameplay. 
Previous features such as kinds and abilities have been removed to refine the experience and improve performance.
    
> P.S If you want more unique expirience, download those mods too:
- [Unicopia](https://modrinth.com/mod/unicopia)
- [Pony Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/ponyorigins)
- [Mine Little Pony](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-little-pony)

If you encounter any bugs or issues, please report them directly on my [GitHub Issues Page](https://github.com/BilivrayKa/Ponified/labels/bug). Your feedback helps improve the mod for everyone!

### Also! ### 

I'm planning to add plushies inspired by your Original Characters (OCs) and ideas from the community. So if you have any ideas just click [here](https://github.com/BilivrayKa/Ponified/labels/ask)!
Found a Bug? Let Me Know!
